nodes.title: Vanguard Staffing Solutions Homepage
nodes.heroTitle: The Right Talent, The Right Fit

heroDescription.processed: We connect exceptional professionals with leading companies. Whether you are looking to hire top talent or advance your career, Vanguard delivers results through personalized recruiting and deep industry expertise.

nodes.ctaTitle: Ready to Find Your Next Great Hire?

ctaDescription.processed: Tell us about your staffing needs and our recruiters will deliver qualified candidates within 48 hours. No upfront fees - you only pay when we make a successful placement.
ctaDescription.summary: Tell us about your staffing needs and our recruiters will deliver qualified candidates within 48 hours. No upfront fees - you only pay when we make a successful placement.
